title: Any agent can release or finish another agent active claim
description: releaseTask and finishTask find the active claim for a task but do not verify that claim.agent matches the acting agent. Any caller can release or complete another agent claim and change the task status. Affected: src/core/mutate.ts. Fix by enforcing claim ownership, or add an explicit force/admin path with distinct events.
resolution: Fixed by requiring the acting agent to match the active claim owner before release or finish can complete an active claim. Added claim_owner_mismatch diagnostics and regression coverage for release and finish.
